user.title: Becker Centronic stick
user.description: Select how Home Assistant connects to your Centronic USB stick.

data_description.device: Path to the Centronic USB stick.
data_description.filename: SQLite file storing the stick's pairing data. Keep the default unless you migrate an existing file.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the serial-to-TCP bridge (for example ser2net).
data_description.filename: SQLite file storing the stick's pairing data. Keep the default unless you migrate an existing file.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Becker Centronic stick.

abort.already_configured: This Becker Centronic stick is already configured.

data_description.channel: Channel the cover is paired to: 1-7, or unit:channel (for example 2:1) when using a sender unit other than 1.
data_description.value_template: Optional template that reports the cover position from another entity.
data_description.remote_id: Optional hand-held remote IDs to follow, formatted as ID:channel (for example 12345:2). Separate multiple remotes with commas.
data_description.travelling_time_down: Seconds the cover needs to travel from open to closed. Enables position control.
data_description.travelling_time_up: Seconds the cover needs to travel from closed to open. Enables position control.

data_description.value_template: Optional template that reports the cover position from another entity.
data_description.remote_id: Optional hand-held remote IDs to follow, formatted as ID:channel (for example 12345:2). Separate multiple remotes with commas.
data_description.travelling_time_down: Seconds the cover needs to travel from open to closed. Enables position control.
data_description.travelling_time_up: Seconds the cover needs to travel from closed to open. Enables position control.

error.invalid_channel: Channel must be 1-7 or unit:channel (for example 2:1).
error.invalid_remote_id: Remote ID must be formatted as ID:channel (for example 12345:2).
error.already_configured: A cover with this channel is already configured.
